MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ZACHARY KATZ's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-14-542040 WITH CASE CGC-15-548272.

The court will sign the proposed stipulated order with the following language added: "All further filings must be in case 542040 only. The 11/19/18 trial in case 548272 is vacated and the case management conference of 7/18/18 in case 542040 remains in effect, now for all cases."

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
